title: Low back pain

red_flags.text: Lists weight loss, fever, night sweats, malignancy, osteoporosis, weakness, gait instability, sensory change, bowel or bladder dysfunction, trauma, infection, injection drugs, corticosteroids, and recent spinal procedures.
red_flags.rationale: Directly supports mapped systemic, trauma, neurological, bowel, bladder, cancer, and weight-loss prompts.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists weight loss, fever, night sweats, malignancy, osteoporosis, weakness, gait instability, sensory change, bowel or bladder dysfunction, trauma, infection, injection drugs, corticosteroids, and recent spinal procedures.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Low Back Pain – 15

red_flags.text: Defines urgent and specialist review for severe or night pain, infection, trauma, neurological deficit, urinary or faecal dysfunction, systemic disease, persistent symptoms, and selected imaging needs.
red_flags.rationale: Directly supports mapped urgent warning, worsening, persistent-symptom, imaging, and clinician-arranged follow-up documentation.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines urgent and specialist review for severe or night pain, infection, trauma, neurological deficit, urinary or faecal dysfunction, systemic disease, persistent symptoms, and selected imaging needs.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Low Back Pain – 15

investigations.text: Describes cauda-equina symptom combinations and limits imaging in short-duration low back pain without associated concern features.
investigations.rationale: Directly supports mapped cauda-equina concern fields and selected imaging review without routine imaging.
investigations.evidence_extract: Describes cauda-equina symptom combinations and limits imaging in short-duration low back pain without associated concern features.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Low Back Pain – 15

source_limitations: The legacy mechanical-back-pain diagnosis must remain clinician-stated.
Specific physical tests, inflammatory markers, urinalysis, medication options, controlled-drug content, heat or cold advice, and fixed follow-up periods remain unsupported by this mapping.

curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
